modules.text:
Connect Teams is a comprehensive team collaboration and project management platform built with modern full-stack technologies.

Designed to enable seamless communication, task tracking, and project organization for distributed teams with enterprise-grade security and performance.

modules.title: The Challenge
modules.text:
Teams need a unified platform for collaboration that combines communication, task management, and project tracking without complexity.

The solution needed to support real-time updates, handle concurrent users, maintain data integrity, and scale to millions of transactions monthly.

modules.title: Architecture & Tech Stack
modules.text:
Built with React + TypeScript frontend for responsive UI and type-safe development.

Node.js + Express backend with PostgreSQL for relational data and Redis for caching and real-time updates.

Containerized with Docker and orchestrated with Kubernetes for high availability and auto-scaling.

modules.title: Core Features
modules.text:
Real-time messaging with WebSocket integration for instant notifications.

Task management with status tracking, assignments, and deadline management.

Project organization with team collaboration spaces, file sharing, and activity feeds.

modules.title: Deployment & DevOps
modules.text:
Containerized with Docker across 3 environments (dev, staging, prod).

Kubernetes orchestration ensures high availability and auto-scaling. GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines achieve sub-5-minute deployments.

Infrastructure as Code with Terraform for AWS resources including S3, networking, and compute.

modules.title: Security & Performance
modules.text:
Implements JWT + OAuth for authentication, MFA for enhanced security, and follows OWASP best practices.

Redis caching strategy optimizes database queries. Soft-delete patterns maintain data integrity.

Designed to handle millions of transactions monthly with sub-100ms latency.
